name: Back Squat
instructions: Bar on upper traps, brace, descend to parallel or below, drive through mid-foot.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Elbows up, bar racked on front delts, vertical torso, drive knees forward and out.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold one dumbbell vertically at chest, sit between hips, drive through whole foot.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Rear foot elevated, lean torso slightly forward, descend until front thigh parallel.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Step forward into a long stride, drop back knee toward floor, drive through front heel.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Feet shoulder-width, lower until thighs near chest without lower-back lift.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit tall, ankles behind pad, extend knees fully, control the eccentric.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hinge at hips, soft knees, bar close to legs, feel hamstring stretch then drive hips through.

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Bar over mid-foot, neutral spine, push the floor away — hips and shoulders rise together.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Wide stance, toes turned out, knees track over toes, drive hips forward at lockout.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on bench, feet shin-vertical at top, drive hips up, ribs down at top.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Heels close to glutes, brace, drive through heels, full hip extension at top.

name: Lying Leg Curl
instructions: Pad just above heels, curl heels to glutes, control eccentric, no hip lift.

name: Seated Leg Curl
instructions: Sit fully back, curl heels under, control eccentric, no torso swing.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Full stretch at bottom, drive up onto big toe, brief pause at top.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Knees bent 90°, full stretch, push up onto balls of feet, control descent.

name: Bench Press
instructions: Arch slightly, retract scapula, lower bar to mid-chest, press up and slightly back.

name: Incline Bench Press
instructions: 30–45° incline, scapula retracted, bar to upper chest, drive bar straight up.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Wrists stacked over elbows, lower with control to chest level, press up and slightly in.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: 30° incline, full ROM, no flaring elbows past 75°, control the descent.

name: Cable Chest Fly
instructions: Slight forward lean, soft elbows, hug a tree — meet hands in front of chest.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Plank position, lower chest to floor, elbows ~45°, full lockout at top.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Dead hang, drive elbows down and back, chin over bar, control descent.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Lean back ~10°, pull bar to upper chest, drive elbows down, full stretch overhead.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge to ~45°, neutral spine, row bar to lower chest/upper abs, squeeze scapulae.

name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
instructions: One knee on bench, neutral spine, row dumbbell to hip, full stretch at bottom.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit tall, retract scapulae first, pull handle to lower abs, no torso swing.

name: Chest-Supported Row
instructions: Chest pinned to pad, row handles to ribs, drive elbows down and back.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Rope at face height, pull rope ends past ears, external rotation at end range.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Bar at clavicle, brace, press straight up, finish with bar over mid-foot.

name: Seated Dumbbell Press
instructions: Back supported, press dumbbells overhead without locking out hard, full ROM.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Slight forward lean, lead with elbows, raise to shoulder height, control descent.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand side-on to stack, raise handle across body to shoulder height.

name: Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Hinge to torso parallel, slight bend in elbows, raise dumbbells out to sides.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Elbows pinned, curl bar without swinging, full stretch at bottom.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Supinate as you curl, elbows still, control the eccentric.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Neutral grip, curl with elbows pinned, brief pause at top.

name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Elbows tucked at sides, push handle down to full lockout, control return.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Dumbbell behind head, elbows narrow, extend overhead, full stretch each rep.

name: Skullcrusher
instructions: Bar over forehead, lower behind head, elbows fixed, extend back to start.

name: Plank
instructions: Forearms under shoulders, ribs down, glutes squeezed, hold for time.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Dead hang, posterior pelvic tilt, raise legs to parallel or higher, no swinging.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel facing stack, rope behind head, crunch ribs toward hips, hips still.
